case_title: LEONG, YOLANDA VS BAKARI, VANESSA ABIERA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONG, YOLANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKARI, VANESSA ABIERA ANDERSON, VAN $5,707.28 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,862.28, THE NAME OF DEFENDANT SUED AS VANESSA ABLERA BAKER IS CORRECTED TO VANESSA ABIERA BAKARI. THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $3619.20 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES-LOSS OF USE; AND $2500 FOR GENERL & SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEONG, YOLANDA AS TO DEFENDANT BAKARI, VANESSA ABIERA ANDERSON, VAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAKARI, VANESSA ABIERA
